item.title: What is your say about this ?
item.description:
Comments

Comment by Aman…. on 2009-08-14 23:29:56 +0530

Holy cow! 🙂

Well, what to say,Mr King seems to be a “pretty confident” sun of a gun 😉 . Challenge for him, can he make Oracle code bugfree 😉 ?

Aman….

Comment by Vaibhav garg on 2009-08-15 11:46:47 +0530

hahahah ahaha LOL ROLF x100

There should be a law against all this crap

Comment by Sidhu on 2009-08-15 14:14:29 +0530

Doode, i have something really useful for you:
